HomeClubs & Hubs

Clubs, Hubs & Networks

Building India's Aerospace Community from Campus to Country

For Colleges & Universities

IAAA Collegiate Club

Launch Your IAAA Collegiate Club - Empower Students, Faculty, and Institutions in Aerospace Excellence!

Minimum 50 to maximum 1000 student members per institution, ₹1,000/student annually. Each Collegiate Club is a campus-based community for aerospace learning and innovation.

Launch Your Club

Key Guidelines for Success

  • All club events require prior IAAA permission and approval
  • Third-party collaborations need proper information sharing
  • Non-compliance may lead to cancellation of Club approval

For Collegiate Clubs

  • Access 4-10 free IAAA-certified courses yearly for each student member
  • 25% of fees returned to department as consultancy for activities
  • Another 25% sponsored for student activities via IAAA-approved vendors
  • Startup support: From idea to launch, tech transfer, investment, and networking
  • Student Leader Stipend for top talents
  • Free industry training for regional best student members
  • Organize IAAA-collaborated regional events
  • Contests, industry connects, career readiness, and higher education support

For Institutions & Faculty

  • Free volunteer membership for faculties
  • Win institutional, faculty, department, and Star Faculty awards
  • Representation in government events
  • R&D connections via supported conferences and industry links

Hub Privileges & Responsibilities

  • Full autonomy for institutional events
  • 10% regional revenue share from student memberships
  • Consultancy role for IAAA programs and PTDC management
  • Mentor local clubs and manage training initiatives
Regional Leadership

IAAA Regional Hubs

Regional Powerhouses Driving National Innovation

Elevate Your IAAA Club to a Regional Hub - Drive Aerospace Innovation Nationwide! Regional Hubs oversee multiple Collegiate Clubs, lead training, and act as regional advisory centres.

Apply for Hub Status
For Schools

IAAA-VAAYU Club

Where Young Minds Begin Their Flight into Aerospace!

The IAAA-VAAYU Club brings space, aviation, and STEM learning to schools. Schools can host VAAYU Clubs under IAAA affiliation and receive annual certifications, project kits, and expert mentoring.

Kick-started at:

Velammal Bodhi Campus - Ology Tech, Tamil Nadu

Start a VAAYU Club

Programs Include

Aeromodelling & Drone Design

Rocketry & Space Exploration

Astronomy & Sky Observation

Aviation & STEM Career Awareness

Robotics & Innovation Projects

Pilot Training Programs

IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community - From School to Sky.
